# ShakiLabs UI artifact

`shakilabs-ui-0.3.7.tgz` is the active exact artifact for `@shakilabs/ui` 0.3.7.

- Source repository: `00.root-shakilabs`
- Source commit: `ac698da25c80c89701fbcccfd48424460e461e71`
- SHA-256: `4554fec4a697961923fea71f32ba12c2ee0091182dc7f3608000b0410de0cfee`

Only the active exact artifact is committed so an isolated Vercel checkout can run `npm ci` without a private registry token.
